style_effects: Subtle steam wisps curl from Beedrill's armored joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished surface. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its metallic seams, casting cold cyan light that casts sharp, geometric shadows. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the light like tiny shards of ice. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
